headline: Cashless Payments Reach 68% of Malaysian Transactions
context: Bank Negara reported 68% of retail transactions were cashless in 2025 up from 42% in 2020 led by DuitNow QR.

cards.big: Cashless payments reach 68% of retail transactions in 2025
cards.sub: DuitNow QR processed 1.2 billion transactions worth RM85 billion

cards.big: e-Wallet users grew to 28 million with Touch n Go and GrabPay at 62% share
cards.sub: Average Malaysian makes 4.2 cashless transactions daily up from 1.8 in 2020

cards.big: Rural cashless adoption lags at 35% versus 78% in urban areas
cards.sub: Limited merchant coverage and internet reliability constrain rural uptake

cards.big: Bank Negara identified RM2.8 billion in e-wallet fraud up 85% from prior year
cards.sub: Unauthorized transactions and social engineering are fastest growing categories

cards.big: Cashless growth tests whether financial inclusion and fraud prevention scale together
68% cashless transactions. Financial inclusion requires that the 32% using cash are not left behind.
